zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthis Keifer於1540年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森時，他的父親Melchior Keifer40歲，母親Maria Hug40歲。他於1565年3月12日與Magdalene Schneider在德國爾特波格比格奧頓豪森結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1585年在他的家鄉享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matthis Keifer于1540年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森时，他的父亲Melchior Keifer40岁，母亲Maria Hug40岁。他于1565年3月12日与Magdalene Schneider在德国爾特波格比格奧頓豪森结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1585年在他的家乡享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Keifer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname for someone who was quarrelsome, from an agent of Middle High German kīben, kīven ‘to quarrel’, German keifen.

variants.name: Keiffer
meanings: German: variant of Keifer and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Keiffer is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Kiefer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Franz, Erwin, Heinz, Dieter, Fritz, Alois, Aloys, Claus, Ernst, Florian, Frieda.
German: occupational name for a cooper or the overseer of a wine cellar, from an agent derivative of Middle High German kuofe ‘vat, barrel’ (from Latin cupa).
German: possibly also from an agent derivative of Middle High German kiffen ‘to quarrel’, hence a nickname for a bickerer.

nameMeanings.name: Matthis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament Greek form of the Hebrew name Mattathia ( see Matthew ), or rather of an Aramaic derivative. The Latin form of the name is Matthaeus. In English the form Matthias is used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament to distinguish the disciple who was chosen after the treachery of Judas to make up the twelve (Acts 1:23–26) from the evangelist Matthew. However, this distinction is not observed in other languages, where Matthias (or a version of it) is often a learned doublet existing alongside a vernacular derivative.

variants.name: Mathias
meanings: and Norwegian: learned doublet of   Mads .

en.lifeSummary: When Matthis Keifer was born in 1540, in Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, his father, Melchior Keifer, was 40 and his mother, Maria Hug, was 40. He married Magdalene Schneider on 12 March 1565, in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1585, in his hometown, at the age of 45.

fr.Werbeln, Saarlouis, Saarland, Deutschlan: Werbeln, Landkreis Saarlouis, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matthis Keifer est né en 1540, à Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Melchior Keifer, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Maria Hug, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Magdalene Schneider le 12 mars 1565, à Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1585, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matthis Keifer 1540 in Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Melchior Keifer 40 und seine Mutter Maria Hug 40. Er hat am 12. März 1565 in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Deutschland Magdalene Schneider geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1585 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matthis Keifer è nato il nel 1540 nel Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Melchior Keifer, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Maria Hug, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Magdalene Schneider il 12 marzo 1565, nel Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1585, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthis Keiferが1540年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグエンズクレイスストラウベンハートオッテンハウセンで生まれた時，父Melchior Keiferは40歳，母Maria Hugは40歳であった。1565年3月12日にドイツウuルッテンバーグネウエンブuルグオッテンハウセンでMagdalene Schneiderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1585年に故郷で45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matthis Keifer(이)가 1540년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 즈크레이스 스트라벤하르드트 오텐하우센에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Melchior Keifer(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Hug(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1565년 3월 12일 독일 wu르테버그 니우브u르그 오텐하우센에서 Magdalene Schneider(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1585년 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matthis Keifer nasceu em 1540, em Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Melchior Keifer, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Maria Hug, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Magdalene Schneider em 12 de março de 1565, em Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1585, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthis Keifer родился в 1540 г. в местности оттенаусен, страубенардт, энзкрис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Melchior Keifer было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Hug, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Magdalene Schneider 12 марта 1565 г. в местности оттенаусен, неуенбuрг, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1585 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matthis Keifer nació en 1540, en Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Melchior Keifer, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Maria Hug, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Magdalene Schneider el 12 de marzo de 1565, en Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1585, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años.
